news.summary: Bill Miller IV, head of Miller Value Partners, decreased the firm's holdings in MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) by 70% during Q4 of 2024, amounting to 15,250 shares from the previous 50,250 shares. The move was disclosed in a 13F-HR report filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Feb. 14. As of Apr. 2, MicroStrategy's stock had dropped by 7.69% from $337.73 to $312.54. By selling 35,000 shares, Miller Value Partners managed to avoid potential losses of about $881,650. The investment firm had initially acquired 50,000 MSTR shares at $327.67 on Nov. 14, establishing an $8.47 million position.
news.headline: Bill Miller's firm reduced MicroStrategy stake by 70% to 15,250 shares from 50,250 in Q4 2024, avoiding $881,650 in potential losses.

news.summary: Investor concerns over President Trump's trade policies causing economic disruption were evident in the Asian markets, with indices reflecting a negative sentiment. The uncertainty surrounding the policies has led to volatile trading, with key indices such as the Nikkei 225 and Hang Seng experiencing fluctuations. This reflects a broader unease among investors, who are closely monitoring the situation for any new developments.
news.headline: Asian markets plummet as fears over Trump’s tariffs escalate, with stocks plunging further.
30-year Treasury bond yield decreases to lowest level since December

news.summary: In a concerning development for Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), major holders recently unfastened and offloaded millions of dollars' worth of the cryptocurrency, anticipating a potential supply shock due to SOL token unstaking. Four significant whales collectively sold off $46.3 million in SOL, as reported by the on-chain monitoring platform Lookonchain. This move by whales, such as HUJBzd selling 258,646 SOL ($30.3M), BnwZvG offloading 80,000 SOL ($9.47M), 8rWuQ5 selling 30,000 SOL ($3.53M), and 2UhUo1 disposing of 25,501 SOL ($3M), could indicate a shift in market sentiment from bullish to bearish. The impact of this large-scale selling activity on the Solana ecosystem remains to be seen.
news.headline: Whales unstaked and dumped $46.3 million worth of Solana (SOL) causing a supply shock and a price dip.

news.summary: In the coming months, Herman Miller, a top design leader worldwide, is set to broaden its online retail footprint by launching virtual stores in Denmark, Finland, Spain, and Sweden. This expansion is part of the company's strategic growth plan and is scheduled to occur in Spring 2025. The move aims to increase the brand's accessibility and cater to a larger international audience. The initiative signifies a significant push into the European market, showcasing the company's commitment to reaching more customers digitally.
news.headline: Herman Miller is adding online stores in 4 new European markets: Denmark, Finland, Spain, and Sweden.
Debating whether or not to bomb Iran - the crucial decision ahead.

news.summary: The President of Zambia made a commitment to combat corruption, with a whistleblower now challenging his declaration. The individual is alleging to expose any fraudulent activities within the government.
news.headline: Zambia's leader vowed to combat corruption but a whistleblower challenges him.com.
Global instability threatens due to Trump's tariffs, per Bloomberg; potential global economic slowdown at risk.

news.summary: The Management Board of TextMagic AS (registration number 16211377) has released the proposed resolutions for approval by shareholders without a meeting. This is being done under clause 2991 of the Commercial Code. The resolutions are for the endorsement of the Company's audited annual report for the year 2024.
news.headline: TextMagic AS allows shareholders to adopt resolutions without meeting to approve audited annual report for 2024.

news.summary: During the Board of Directors meeting on April 3, 2025, led by Sophie Bellon, the Board authorized the consolidated financial statements for the first half of Fiscal 2025, concluding on February 28, 2025.
news.headline: Sodexo's financial results for first half of Fiscal 2025 approved in board meeting on April 3, 2025 chaired by Sophie Bellon.

news.summary: A notice has been issued by the Board of Directors for the Annual General Meeting of Zelluna ASA scheduled at 14:00 CET on April 29, 2025, in Oslo.
news.headline: Zelluna ASA to hold Annual General Meeting on April 29, 2025, at 14:00 CET in Oslo.

news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, LHV Group is set to distribute dividends at a rate of 9 euro cents per share. Shareholders eligible for dividend payouts will be determined by the end of trading on 9 April 2025 through the Nasdaq CSD settlement system. The ex-dividend date, marking the day ownership rights change for shares, is scheduled for 8 April 2025 - after this date, new shareholders will not receive dividends for the 2024 financial year. Dividends will be paid out to shareholders on 10 April 2025.
news.headline: AS LHV Group will pay 9 euro cents per share dividend for FY2024. Ex-dividend date: 8 April 2025. Payment date: 10 April 2025.

news.summary: On the 4th of April, 2025, IBA (Ion Beam Applications S.A., listed on EURONEXT), a global leader in particle accelerator technology, is set to hold a Capital Markets Day (CMD) on Monday, the 7th of April. The event will run from 2:00 pm to 5:00 pm CEST (8:00 am ET to 11:00 am ET) at the company's headquarters in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium, with a live webcast available for remote access.
news.headline: IBA to present growth strategy at 2025 CMD on April 7, 2-5pm CEST. Leading in particle accelerator tech.

news.summary: Fortreum has achieved the impressive position of #10 on the Inc. Regionals: Mid-Atlantic list for companies with a remarkable median growth rate of 95 percent. This notable achievement was announced on April 3, 2025, in Landsdowne, Virginia. Inc. is a prominent media brand, providing valuable insights and resources for entrepreneurs and business leaders. This recognition highlights Fortreum's significant growth and success within the region.
news.headline: Fortreum ranked #10 on Inc.'s 2025 list of fastest-growing private companies in the Mid-Atlantic with a 95% growth rate.

news.summary: A recently launched program is offering thorough in-person and virtual AI training to boost adoption and drive industry revenue, with 50% of available seats specifically allotted for women's sports executives. This initiative is based in Boston and was introduced on April 3, 2025. Sports Innovation Lab, known for data-driven solutions, is spearheading this effort.
news.headline: Sports Innovation Lab launches AI Advantage Program offering in-person & virtual training, with 50% seats for women executives. Boston, Apr 3, 2025.

news.summary: Enformion, a prominent company specializing in data intelligence and analytics solutions, has received the prestigious title of "Data as a Service Company of the Year" in the recent 2025 Data Breakthrough Awards, showcasing its dedication to innovation and superior services. This award reaffirms Enformion's position as a leader in the industry, displaying its unmatched expertise in providing top-tier data solutions.
news.headline: Enformion awarded 2025 Data Breakthrough as Data as a Service Company of the Year, showcasing their innovation and excellence.

news.summary: Renowned figure in the industry with extensive experience in brokerage and deep local knowledge joins one of the country's leading luxury firms. TTR Sotheby's International Realty recently announced the addition of Donna Evers, a highly respected individual in the Washington, D.C. area. The move took place on April 3, 2025.
news.headline: Real Estate veteran Donna Evers joins TTR Sotheby's. D.C. icon with decades of experience enhances luxury firm.

news.summary: Digital Check's SmartSource Expert Elite check scanner, originally intended for network use only, has been upgraded to also function as a USB scanner with the introduction of SimpleSwitch. This innovative feature allows users to effortlessly switch between USB and network modes through a simple button-press sequence. The conversion enhances the scanner's versatility and usability. The company, based in NORTHBROOK, Ill., unveiled this development on April 3, highlighting its commitment to improving efficiency and convenience for its customers.
news.headline: Digital Check's SmartSource Expert Elite scanner can now switch between USB and network modes with a button press, offering versatility for users.

news.summary: The LSI Foundation, a prominent organization that offers pro bono language services to top law firms, has unveiled an enhanced range of multi-language analytics and generative AI solutions to enhance its existing translation services. This development allows a larger number of pro bono clients to access high-quality language assistance.
news.headline: LSI Foundation enhances pro bono legal support with new multi-language AI tools for improved translation capabilities.

news.summary: Pacific Mobile Structures is excited to share that they have become an approved vendor under the KCDA Furniture Contract. This accomplishment highlights their dedication to offering top-notch space solutions for schools, government agencies, and more. This new milestone showcases their commitment to delivering quality services to their clients.
news.headline: Pacific Mobile Structures awarded KCDA Furniture Contract, expanding services. Committed to providing high-quality space solutions.

news.summary: An ongoing training series is set to provide in-depth analysis of worldwide markets, investment tactics, and macroeconomic developments. Launched by financial expert José Manuel Sánchez Pérez, the sessions aim to offer data-backed insights amid growing instability in global financial markets. The initiative comes amidst rising market uncertainties and aims to equip participants with comprehensive understanding and strategic solutions.
news.headline: José Manuel Sánchez Pérez to host live training series on global markets amid rising investor interest.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been revealed that Beth-Ann Krimsky, who holds the position of national litigation chair and partner at Greenspoon Marder LLP, has been appointed as the chair of the Board of Directors for both the Memorial and Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital Foundations. During her tenure, which spans two years, Krimsky will be responsible for overseeing the operations of these foundations, which play a key role in providing essential services to the community.
news.headline: Beth-Ann Krimsky appointed Chair of Memorial & Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital Foundations for 2 years.

news.summary: Silver State HVAC, Refrigeration & Plumbing proudly reveals the recent acquisition of Westaire Heating & Air Conditioning, Inc. located in Ventura, California. The acquisition was made public on April 3, 2025, in Las Vegas. Silver State HVAC, Refrigeration & Plumbing, the acquiring company, has successfully taken over Westaire Heating & Air Conditioning, Inc., marking a significant milestone for both companies.
news.headline: Silver State HVAC acquires Westaire Heating & Air Conditioning in Ventura, California. Announcement made in Las Vegas on April 3, 2025.

news.summary: A partnership has been established between LendingOne and Blanket, enabling the integration of LendingOne's investor loan products into Blanket's proptech platform. This collaboration, effective as of April 3, 2025, in Boca Raton, Florida, will equip property managers with the ability to offer smooth financing opportunities to their investor customers. LendingOne, known as a prominent lending entity, will now work alongside Blanket to enhance the financial services available in the property management sector.
news.headline: LendingOne partners with Blanket to offer financing solutions for real estate investors. Integration of investor loan solutions on Blanket's proptech platform to provide seamless options. (Word count: 29)

news.summary: Jesse B. Wiese, a highly committed lawyer, specializes in civil litigation, business law, real estate, and traffic offenses. Alongside his legal expertise, he holds a significant leadership position at a renowned faith-based nonprofit at the national level, where he leverages strategic business strategies to drive growth. Residing in Virginia Beach, Jesse Wiese excels in navigating various legal aspects and contributing to the expansion of the nonprofit sector through his dual roles.
news.headline: Anchor Legal Group, PLLC welcomes Jesse B. Wiese, Esq., a dedicated attorney focusing on civil litigation, business law, real estate, and traffic offenses. He serves in a national leadership role at a faith-based nonprofit. Located in Virginia Beach.
Australian Dollar Extends Decline to 1.5%, Most in Two Month

news.summary: Brander Group Inc. has been recognized as #92 on the 2025 Financial Times list of Americas' Fastest Growing Companies. The company, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, experienced a significant revenue growth of 451% over a three-year span. The achievement was announced on April 3, 2025, highlighting Brander Group's remarkable progress in the business world.
news.headline: Brander Group, #92 on Financial Times' Fastest Growing Companies in 2025, with 451% revenue increase over 3 years.

news.summary: Boca Bearings is known for its extensive collection of Ceramic Hybrid EMQ Bearings, providing customers with quick access to top-notch components and avoiding typical lead time delays. The company's warehouse boasts a wide variety of sizes, guaranteeing a seamless procurement process for consumers.
news.headline: Boca Bearings has an extensive inventory of Ceramic Hybrid EMQ Bearings available for immediate shipment, eliminating lead times for customers.

news.summary: Euler Products, Inc, a top provider of luxury in-flight sleep products, has launched the Gen III Diep Sleep System™, the latest innovation tailored for private and business aviation. This state-of-the-art sleep solution is crafted to improve long-haul flights, boasting patented features for enhanced comfort and relaxation.
news.headline: Euler Products introduces Gen III Diep Sleep System™ for private jets, enhancing comfort during long-haul flights.

news.summary: Matt Cardona and Brian Myers, professional wrestlers, will be showcased on an exclusive variant cover of Amazing Spider-Man #1. The announcement was made by CollectMajor.com on April 3, 2025. This special edition cover will feature the wrestlers in a unique design for the highly anticipated comic issue. Fans can look forward to this limited edition release of the comic, which is set to draw attention with the involvement of the wrestling stars.
news.headline: Wrestlers Cardona and Myers to feature on variant cover of Amazing Spider-Man #1, paying homage to original issue.

news.summary: Celebrating its 50th anniversary, the renowned fondue chain, Melting Pot, looks back on fifty years of offering a memorable dining experience and unveils special festivities in honor of this milestone. The company, headquartered in Tampa, Florida, disclosed that exciting limited-time celebrations are in store.
news.headline: Melting Pot marks 50 years with special menus, new offerings, and celebrations. Iconic brand reflects on success.

news.summary: Victus Marketing offers specialized marketing services to small and medium-sized enterprises, catering to all industry types. This agency delivers high-quality marketing strategies and implementation without the burden of full-time expenses. Their focus is on data-driven marketing solutions that enable businesses to enhance their performance and reach their maximum potential.
news.headline: New marketing agency, Victus Marketing, offers top-tier strategy to small/mid-sized businesses, aiming to cut costs, and maximize success.

news.summary: In a joint announcement on April 3, 2025, SNOMED International and LOINC® by Regenstrief disclosed their updated partnership agreement and launch of the LOINC® Ontology. This collaboration aims to enhance interoperability between the two standards, SNOMED CT and LOINC®, for improved healthcare data management. The release of the LOINC® Ontology signifies a significant step towards achieving seamless integration between the standards. It leverages the strengths of both systems to facilitate better organization and utilization of medical data. This partnership represents a crucial development in the healthcare industry to promote standardized data exchange.
news.headline: SNOMED International and LOINC® renew collaboration agreement for LOINC Ontology production release in 2025.

news.summary: A renowned full-service marketing firm, M3 Agency, has recently merged with LMMG, a boutique agency known for its expertise in real estate, lifestyle, and brand marketing. Following the merger, LMMG will be integrated into the M3 Agency brand. Laurie Matthews, the former Principal of LMMG, will step into the role of Partner and Chief Marketing Officer within M3 Agency. This strategic partnership brings together the strengths of both agencies and significantly expands M3 Agency's capabilities.
news.headline: LMMG merges with M3 Agency, expanding real estate marketing. LMMG to operate under M3, ex-Principal joins as Partner.

news.summary: The article discusses the potential for one last rally in altcoins during this cycle, with analyst Jamie Coutts indicating that altcoins with real utility and strong network activity will likely see price gains. There are over 36 million altcoins in existence, with Ethereum holding the majority share of total value locked. Coutts advises traders to monitor network activity as a key indicator for trading in crypto and anticipates an altcoin market upswing within the next two months. The total crypto market cap is down 8% over the past 30 days, and blockchain network activity has declined in the midst of a broader market downturn. Altcoin indicators are currently signaling a Bitcoin-dominated market, with altcoin season still not in sight. Key metrics such as the Altcoin Speculation Index and Altcoin Season Index are significantly down, suggesting a lack of momentum for altcoins. Bitcoin dominance is cited as being less relevant as an indicator for altcoin season, with trading volume being considered more important.
news.headline: Altcoins face final rally potential, driven by utility & network activity. Quality names likely to succeed. $36M altcoins exist; ETH dominant, activity key indicator. Altcoin market upswing expected in 2 months. Experts say time for altcoin season not near; indicators low. Bitcoin trading volume more relevant than dominance.
